name: Microwave Brocolli-Mushroom Scallop
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds fresh broccoli, cut into 2-inch pieces
1/2 cup sharp cheddar cheese (about 2 oz), grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Place broccoli and water in a 2-quart casserole dish; cover. Microwave until broccoli is fork-tender, 10-12 minutes, stirring after half the cooking time. Drain and set aside.
2. Place mushrooms and butter in a 4-cup measure or medium bowl. Microwave until butter is melted and mushrooms are tender, 2-4 minutes, stirring once.
3. Stir in flour, onion powder, salt, and pepper. Blend in milk. Microwave until thickened, 5-8 minutes, stirring once each minute.
4. Pour sauce over broccoli. Sprinkle with grated cheese. Microwave until heated and cheese is melted, another 3-8 minutes.
() Using frozen broccoli: Substitute 1 10-oz package of frozen cut broccoli. Microwave until fork-tender, 8-11 minutes, stirring after half the cooking time. Continue as directed.
